form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into fourth after being driven well back, behind Bettathanlife at this track over 2185m in a 4yo+ NR 55 to 61 on March 30 at $16. Performed better the start before where he posted a big 5 m win after showing early speed, (Fr2) at Bunbury (2:35.80) beating Tashs Spartan in 4yo+ NR 55 to 60 on March 28 at $4.60. Capable of playing a major role.
